generator: deep-architecture-foundry ladder sealer (metadata only, no weight bytes fetched)
authority_note: Every field marked VERIFIED_FETCHED was read live from the official Hugging Face API (https://huggingface.co/api/models/{id}) or the official config.json on the main revision of that repo. No weights were downloaded. Community repacks are not scientific authorities.

evidence_classes.VERIFIED_FETCHED: fetched live from the official repo API or its official config.json on this date
evidence_classes.DERIVED: arithmetic over VERIFIED_FETCHED numbers, the arithmetic is written out in the field
evidence_classes.REPORTED: came from the campaign brief or secondary press, NOT confirmed against an official artifact
evidence_classes.UNRESOLVED: could not be confirmed; treated as absent

non_interference.heavy_lease: held by the live Qwen controller; this sealer acquired none
non_interference.actions_taken: HTTP GET of model metadata JSON and config.json only; total transfer under 5 MB
non_interference.actions_refused: no weight download, no forward, no packing, no lease, no GPU

storage_mode_policy.FULL_DISK_RESIDENT: main revision safetensors total <= 90 GB; the whole snapshot can sit on local disk beside campaign outputs with headroom
storage_mode_policy.VULTURE_SHARD_SERIAL: total > 90 GB, largest single shard <= 22 GB, total <= 1000 GB; fetch one shard, consume it, delete it, advance; peak local footprint is one shard
storage_mode_policy.BOUNDED_REMOTE_RANGE: total > 1000 GB, or the repo is gated or unreleased so no local materialization is possible; read only the byte spans named by the safetensors index via HTTP range requests
storage_mode_policy.BLOCKED_GATED: repo exists but resolve endpoints require manual license acceptance and an auth token; no anonymous access path exists
storage_mode_policy.UNDETERMINED: no released weights, so no storage mode can be assigned
storage_mode_policy.note: Thresholds are derived from the measured 122 GiB free disk and 96 GB usable RAM on this host. They are policy, not physics; they move when the host moves.

readiness_stages.A0: CANDIDATE_NAMED: the rung is named in the campaign, nothing verified
readiness_stages.A1: REPO_RESOLVED: official repo id, license, and immutable revision sha verified live
readiness_stages.A2: CONFIG_BOUND: official config.json fetched; architecture, routing, and dtype fields read from it
readiness_stages.A3: ADAPTER_DECLARED: an ArchAdapter table entry exists in crates/hawking-seed-c/src/providers/adapters.rs for this family
readiness_stages.A4: TENSOR_MAP_VERIFIED: adapter TensorNames cross-checked against the repo model.safetensors.index.json
readiness_stages.A5: SOURCE_SEALED: a SourceRecord with revision plus per shard sha256 sealed via providers/source_decl.rs
readiness_stages.A6: SHARD_STREAM_PROVEN: at least one real shard read and dequantized locally
readiness_stages.A7: PARENT_FORWARD_VERIFIED: real parent forward producing real logits

adapter_gap_summary: Only gpt_oss covers a ladder rung. qwen3_moe, qwen3_5_moe, minimax_m3_vl, deepseek_v32, glm_moe_dsa, kimi_k25, deepseek_v4, ernie4_5_moe, llama4, and bailing_moe all have NO adapter entry. Every rung above F0 is therefore capped at A2 until adapters.rs is extended.

rungs.role: harvested and closed; honest boundary sealed, source released
rungs.param_count_note: HF reports 120412337472 counting packed U8 elements as parameters. The MXFP4 block-plus-scale layout means this is NOT the model card parameter count. No unpacked count is asserted here.

storage_mode.reason: 130.5 GB main revision exceeds the 90 GB resident threshold and roughly equals the 131 GB free disk, so a full snapshot leaves no working room; max shard 10.54 GB streams comfortably. Moot in practice: this rung is closed.

rungs.readiness_evidence: A1 and A2 VERIFIED_FETCHED; A3 satisfied by the existing gpt_oss ArchAdapter; A4 through A8 REPORTED from the campaign brief (harvested and closed, honest boundary sealed)

rungs.role: ACTIVE parent; live campaign running at seal time

storage_mode.reason: 470.2 GB far exceeds 131 GB free disk; 118 shards at a 4.00 GB maximum are ideal for fetch-consume-delete. This is exactly the mode the live campaign is running.

rungs.readiness_evidence: A1 and A2 VERIFIED_FETCHED; A5 through A7 REPORTED (live controller pid 86590 at approximately layer 48/94, not inspected by this sealer). A3 NOT satisfied: there is no qwen3_moe ArchAdapter in the ABI.

rungs.hybrid_recurrent_confirmation: VERIFIED_FETCHED. The claim of hybrid recurrent-attention is bound to config text_config.layer_types, which literally contains 45 layers of value linear_attention and 15 of full_attention on a period of 4, plus the mamba-style fields linear_conv_kernel_dim and mamba_ssm_dtype. This is not inferred from marketing.
rungs.brief_correction: The brief did not state that F2 is multimodal. It is: top level architectures is Qwen3_5MoeForConditionalGeneration with a vision_config (depth 27, patch_size 16, spatial_merge_size 2), image_token_id 248056 and video_token_id 248057, and the repo carries preprocessor_config.json and video_preprocessor_config.json. Evidence VERIFIED_FETCHED.

storage_mode.reason: 806.8 GB is 6.2x free disk so residency is impossible, but 94 shards at a 9.66 GB maximum stream one at a time inside both 131 GB disk and 96 GB usable RAM.

rungs.readiness_evidence: A1 and A2 VERIFIED_FETCHED. A3 blocked: no qwen3_5_moe ArchAdapter exists, and the linear_attention layer class has no counterpart in the current adapter table (mamba2 is the nearest and is NOT the same operator).

rungs.license_evidence: VERIFIED_FETCHED (cardData.license_name minimax-community, license_link LICENSE in repo). NOT an OSI license; redistribution terms must be read before any artifact is published.

config_facts.moe_layer_freq: first 3 layers dense, layers 3..59 MoE (list of 60 flags)

sparse_attention_confirmation.sparse_attention_freq: off for layers 0,1,2; on for layers 3..59
sparse_attention_confirmation.evidence: VERIFIED_FETCHED (text_config.sparse_attention_config). The MiniMax Sparse Attention claim is bound to real config fields, not to a product page.

rungs.size_discrepancy_note: The API usedStorage field reports 1708.4 GB, exactly 2x the 854.2 GB main-revision safetensors sum. usedStorage spans all revisions and branches, so the main-revision sum is the number the storage-mode call uses.

storage_mode.reason: 854.2 GB main revision, 59 shards, largest 16.10 GB. Over the 90 GB residency threshold and under the 1000 GB range-read threshold; 16.10 GB peak fits both disk and RAM.

rungs.readiness_evidence: A1 and A2 VERIFIED_FETCHED. A3 blocked: no minimax_m3_vl adapter, and the model ships custom_code (auto_map) meaning the reference implementation is not in upstream transformers.

rungs.role: giant DeepSeekMoE plus DeepSeek Sparse Attention

related_repo_verified.note: the experimental sibling also exists and is also mit; V3.2 base_model tag points at DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp-Base

rungs.dsa_confirmation: VERIFIED_FETCHED: the lightning indexer fields index_head_dim 128, index_n_heads 64, index_topk 2048 are present in the official config. MLA is bound to kv_lora_rank 512 with split qk_nope 128 plus qk_rope 64.
rungs.context_note: max_position_embeddings is 163840, NOT 1M. Any 1M claim for this rung would be REPORTED and is not supported by the official config.

storage_mode.reason: 689.5 GB total, 163 shards, largest 6.64 GB. Small shards make this the cheapest large rung to stream; peak footprint under 7 GB.

rungs.readiness_evidence: A1 and A2 VERIFIED_FETCHED. A3 blocked: no deepseek_v32 adapter; MLA plus a lightning indexer has no counterpart in the current attention families.

rungs.role: DSA plus IndexShare plus MTP, 1M context

storage_mode.reason: 1506.7 GB exceeds the 1000 GB serial-traversal threshold. The BF16 fallback should only be range-read for specific tensors where FP8 rounding is the thing under test; otherwise use the FP8 primary.

rungs.dsa_confirmation: VERIFIED_FETCHED: index_head_dim 128, index_n_heads 32, index_topk 2048, index_topk_freq 4, index_skip_topk_offset 3, plus a per-layer indexer_types list of length 78.
rungs.indexshare_confirmation: VERIFIED_FETCHED: the official config contains the literal field index_share_for_mtp_iteration = true. The IndexShare claim is bound to that field, nothing more.

storage_mode.reason: FP8 primary is 755.6 GB across 141 shards, largest 5.37 GB. Choosing the FP8 repo over the BF16 repo halves traversal bytes and keeps this rung out of BOUNDED_REMOTE_RANGE.

rungs.readiness_evidence: A1 and A2 VERIFIED_FETCHED for both the FP8 primary and the BF16 fallback. A3 blocked: no glm_moe_dsa adapter.

rungs.role: native INT4, MLA, multimodal with text core
rungs.license_evidence: VERIFIED_FETCHED (cardData.license_name modified-mit). Not plain MIT; the modification must be read before redistribution.
rungs.mla_confirmation: VERIFIED_FETCHED: the text config is a DeepseekV3ForCausalLM with kv_lora_rank 512, q_lora_rank 1536, and split qk_nope 128 plus qk_rope 64. MLA is bound to those fields.

native_int4_confirmation.scope_correction: INT4 covers the ROUTED experts only. Attention, shared experts, dense MLP, lm_head, the vision tower, and the mm projector are explicitly excluded and remain BF16. Saying the whole model is INT4 would be an overclaim.

param_accounting.cross_check: DERIVED: 1014687129600 int4 values at 0.5 bytes = 507.34 GB, plus 43902267888 bf16 at 2 bytes = 87.80 GB, total 595.14 GB, which matches the measured 595.2 GB main-revision safetensors sum. So HF is reporting UNPACKED parameter counts here and the 1T INT4 figure is real.

storage_mode.reason: 595.2 GB across 64 shards, largest 9.81 GB. Native INT4 makes this the smallest trillion-parameter-class rung on the ladder by a wide margin, but it is still 4.5x free disk so it cannot be resident.

rungs.readiness_evidence: A1 and A2 VERIFIED_FETCHED. A3 blocked: no kimi_k25 adapter, and pack-quantized int4 with group_size 32 is a dequantization path the ABI does not yet declare.
rungs.tokenizer_protocol_note: This rung does NOT ship tokenizer.json. It ships tiktoken.model plus a Python tokenization_kimi.py. A tokenizers-crate fast path will not work; a tiktoken-compatible reader is required.

rungs.role: 1.6T, compressed and hash attention plus mHC

csa_hca_mhc_confirmation.verified: The official config contains compress_ratios (length 62) and compress_rope_theta, an index_topk 1024 lightning indexer, sliding_window 128, num_hash_layers 3, and the hc_* family hc_mult 4 / hc_sinkhorn_iters 20 / hc_eps. These fields exist.
csa_hca_mhc_confirmation.reported_not_verified: Binding the names CSA, HCA, and mHC to those specific fields comes from the campaign brief. No official DeepSeek document was fetched that maps the name mHC onto hc_mult, hc_sinkhorn_iters, and num_hash_layers. Treat the names as REPORTED and the fields as VERIFIED_FETCHED. Implement against the field names, not the acronyms.

param_accounting.byte_cross_check: DERIVED: 786.382 GB (I8 at 1 byte) + 49.150 GB (E8M0) + 23.169 GB (E4M3) + 5.634 GB (BF16 at 2 bytes) + 0.351 GB (F32) = 864.69 GB, matching the measured 864.7 GB main-revision sum. So HF is counting PACKED I8 bytes here, unlike the Kimi rung.
param_accounting.true_param_count: DERIVED: config declares expert_dtype fp4, so each I8 byte holds 2 fp4 values: 786381668352 x 2 = 1572763336704 expert values. The E8M0 scale count is an exact independent check: 1572763336704 / 32 = 49148854272, versus the reported 49150268416 F8_E8M0 (0.003 percent apart, the remainder being non-expert scales). Real parameter count is therefore approximately 1572.76e9 fp4 + 23.17e9 fp8 + 2.82e9 bf16 = 1.599e12, that is 1.6T. The brief's 1.6T figure is CONFIRMED by arithmetic; the HF headline 861.6B is a packed-byte artifact.
param_accounting.block_size_finding: DERIVED: the exact 1:32 ratio of fp4 values to E8M0 scales means block-32 microscaling, an MXFP4-shaped layout, not the [128,128] weight_block_size in the fp8 quantization_config (which governs the fp8 tensors only).

storage_mode.reason: 864.7 GB across 64 shards, largest 13.96 GB, under the 22 GB shard ceiling and the 1000 GB traversal ceiling. A 1.6T-parameter model that streams in 14 GB bites is the best size-to-capability ratio on the ladder.

rungs.readiness_evidence: A1 and A2 VERIFIED_FETCHED. A3 blocked: no deepseek_v4 adapter. Two new source dtypes (F8_E8M0 scales, I8-packed fp4 experts) are not in the current declared dtype set (MXFP4, BF16).

rungs.role: 2.8T, 16-of-896 experts, KDA, Attention Residuals, Stable LatentMoE

rungs.author_listing_check: VERIFIED_FETCHED: the full moonshotai author listing sorted by lastModified was fetched. Newest entries are Kimi-K2.7-Code (2026-06-15), Kimi-K2.6 (2026-05-19), Kimi-K2.5 (2026-04-30). No K3 repo of any name is present.
rungs.license_reported: modified MIT, REPORTED by secondary press only, no license file fetched
rungs.release_status_basis: REPORTED: secondary coverage dated 2026-07-16 states a 2.8T MoE announced with weights promised on Hugging Face on 2026-07-27. Seal date is 2026-07-20, so the promised date has not arrived. Nothing official has been fetched.
rungs.config_facts: UNRESOLVED. No config.json exists to fetch.

reported_architecture_claims.warning: Every item below came from secondary press, NOT from an official config, tensor index, or paper fetched by this sealer. None of it may be used to declare an adapter, a tensor name, or a dimension.

rungs.fabrication_guard: NO tensor names, NO layer counts, NO hidden sizes, and NO dtypes are recorded for this rung. Any such value appearing later without a fetched official artifact is fabricated and must be deleted.

storage_mode.reason: No released weights. A storage mode cannot be assigned to bytes that do not exist. Re-run this sealer after the promised release date; if total exceeds 1000 GB (likely at 2.8T) the mode will be BOUNDED_REMOTE_RANGE.

rungs.readiness_gate: F8 stays at A0 / PENDING_OFFICIAL_WEIGHTS until ALL of the following verifiably exist: repo id, license, immutable revision sha, config.json, tokenizer assets, model.safetensors.index.json, and actual weight shards. Partial existence does not advance the stage.

param_accounting.true_param_count: DERIVED: I8 141733920768 x 2 fp4 = 283467841536 expert values; the independent scale check 283467841536 / 32 = 8858370048 matches the reported 8858737664 F8_E8M0 to 0.004 percent. Real total is approximately 283.47e9 + 6.02e9 fp8 + 1.42e9 bf16 = 290.9e9, that is roughly 291B, not the 158B HF headline.

storage_mode.reason: 159.6 GB is the closest any rung gets to residency but still exceeds the 131 GB free disk. 46 shards at 3.60 GB max stream trivially. This is the correct rung to prove the deepseek_v4 adapter on before spending traversal on the 864.7 GB F7.

probes.role_note: Highest-value probe on the list: it is the same deepseek_v4 family and the same fp4-in-I8 plus E8M0 layout as F7, at one fifth the bytes.

storage_mode.reason: 482.1 GB, 49 shards, 10.00 GB max. Same qwen3_moe family as the live F1 parent, so it reuses whatever adapter F1 gets, at FP8 instead of BF16.

probes.note: This repo uses moe_num_experts and moe_k rather than the Qwen or DeepSeek field names. Adapter Moe tables must not assume a single naming convention. Also the only rung with zero shared experts (moe_num_shared_experts 0).

probes.config_facts: UNRESOLVED: config.json resolve returned 401. The tree and API metadata are public but file contents require manual license acceptance plus an auth token. No architecture fields are asserted.

size.evidence: VERIFIED_FETCHED (tree API is public even though resolve is gated)

storage_mode.reason: gated is manual, so neither shard streaming nor byte-range reads have an anonymous path. Post-acceptance the shape would be VULTURE_SHARD_SERIAL (803.2 GB, 21.47 GB max shard, just under the 22 GB ceiling). Gate acceptance is a human decision and is NOT taken by this sealer.

probes.note: Only rung on the whole list whose config could not be read. Marked UNRESOLVED rather than filled in from memory.

storage_mode.reason: 1999.4 GB of BF16 is 2x the serial traversal ceiling and 15x free disk. Range-read named tensors only. Note the context window is just 32768, the shortest on the entire list, which lowers its value as a long-context probe.

community_repack_policy: No rung on this ladder resolved to a community repack. Every id above is the model author's own namespace (openai, Qwen, MiniMaxAI, deepseek-ai, zai-org, moonshotai, baidu, meta-llama, inclusionAI). If a future rung resolves only to a third-party repack, it must be flagged NOT_A_SCIENTIFIC_AUTHORITY and may be used for smoke tests only, never for a sealed capability claim.
